parents.subject: LU-15358 tests: Variable incorrectly defined under sanityn

commit.subject: ATM-2271 tests: run proposed test groups
commit.message:
ATM-2271 tests: run proposed test groups

Run the proposed test suites in review testing environment
to collect timing and failure information before running
tests on every master patch.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=replay-dual,performance-sanity,sanity-benchmark,replay-vbr,parallel-scale-nfsv4
Test-Parameters: testlist=obdfilter-survey,metadata-updates,parallel-scale,racer,parallel-scale-nfsv3
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=replay-dual,performance-sanity,sanity-benchmark,replay-vbr,parallel-scale-nfsv4
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=obdfilter-survey,metadata-updates,parallel-scale,racer,parallel-scale-nfsv3
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=replay-dual,performance-sanity,sanity-benchmark,replay-vbr,parallel-scale-nfsv4
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=obdfilter-survey,metadata-updates,parallel-scale,racer,parallel-scale-nfsv3
Test-Parameters: fstype=ldiskfs mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=replay-dual,performance-sanity,sanity-benchmark,replay-vbr,parallel-scale-nfsv4
Test-Parameters: fstype=ldiskfs mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=obdfilter-survey,metadata-updates,parallel-scale,racer,parallel-scale-nfsv3
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ifc2dd8e806337cefccffeada9c75b3335b4fb793
